# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/build-rk356x
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

OPENCV_GENERATE_PKGCONFIG:BOOL=OFF

//Generate setup_vars* scripts
OPENCV_GENERATE_SETUPVARS:BOOL=ON

//URI to a MathJax installation
OPENCV_MATHJAX_RELPATH:STRING=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3.0.1

//Python3 version
OPENCV_PYTHON3_VERSION:BOOL=OFF

//Build test with CANN
OPENCV_TEST_DNN_CANN:BOOL=OFF

//Build test with OpenVINO code
OPENCV_TEST_DNN_OPENVINO:BOOL=OFF

//Build test with TFLite
OPENCV_TEST_DNN_TFLITE:BOOL=ON

//Build test with TIM-VX
OPENCV_TEST_DNN_TIMVX:BOOL=OFF

//Timestamp of OpenCV build configuration
OPENCV_TIMESTAMP:STRING=2026-01-22T07:42:26Z

//Treat warnings as errors
OPENCV_WARNINGS_ARE_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable TPsot==TNsot fix. See https://github.com/uclouvain/openjpeg/issues/254.
OPJ_DISABLE_TPSOT_FIX:BOOL=OFF

//Build with thread/mutex support 
OPJ_USE_THREAD:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
OpenBLAS_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=OpenBLAS_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
OpenBLAS_LIB:FILEPATH=OpenBLAS_LIB-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
OpenCV_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/build-rk356x

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for OpenCV_HAL.
OpenCV_HAL_DIR:PATH=OpenCV_HAL_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
OpenCV_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for OpenJPEG.
OpenJPEG_DIR:PATH=OpenJPEG_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Allow building parallel plugin support
PARALLEL_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=ON

//Path to a library.
PNG_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=PNG_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
PNG_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/home/tspi/sdk/buildroot/output/rockchip_rk3566/host/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/lib/libpng.so

//Path to a file.
PNG_PNG_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/home/tspi/sdk/buildroot/output/rockchip_rk3566/host/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/include

//Force rebuilding .proto files (protoc should be available)
PROTOBUF_UPDATE_FILES:BOOL=OFF

//Path to Python interpreter
PYTHON3_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/python3

//Python include dir
PYTHON3_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=

//Python include dir 2
PYTHON3_INCLUDE_DIR2:PATH=

//Path to Python library
PYTHON3_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=

//Path to Python debug
PYTHON3_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=

//Build with Python Limited API (not available with numpy >=1.15
// <1.17)
PYTHON3_LIMITED_API:BOOL=OFF

//Path to numpy headers
PYTHON3_NUMPY_INCLUDE_DIRS:PATH=

//Where to install the python packages.
PYTHON3_PACKAGES_PATH:STRING=lib/python3.8/site-packages

//Path to a library.
TIFF_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=TIFF_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
TIFF_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=TIFF_LIBRARY_RELEASE-NOTFOUND

//Use win32 IO system (Microsoft Windows only)
USE_WIN32_FILEIO:BOOL=FALSE

//Allow building and using of videoio plugins
VIDEOIO_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=ON

//List of videoio backends to be compiled as plugins (ffmpeg, gstreamer,
// mfx, msmf or special value 'all')
VIDEOIO_PLUGIN_LIST:STRING=

//Include IEEE1394 support
WITH_1394:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ADE framework (required for Graph API module)
WITH_ADE:BOOL=ON

//Include Aravis GigE support
WITH_ARAVIS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable AVIF support
WITH_AVIF:BOOL=ON

//Include CANN support
WITH_CANN:BOOL=OFF

//Use NVidia carotene acceleration library for ARM platform
WITH_CAROTENE:BOOL=ON

//Include Clp support (EPL)
WITH_CLP:BOOL=OFF

//Include NVidia Cuda Runtime support
WITH_CUDA:BOOL=OFF

//Include Eigen2/Eigen3 support
WITH_EIGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Use Qualcomm FastCV acceleration library for ARM platform
WITH_FASTCV:BOOL=OFF

//Include FFMPEG support
WITH_FFMPEG:BOOL=OFF

//Include Flatbuffers support (required by DNN/TFLite importer)
WITH_FLATBUFFERS:BOOL=ON

//Include framebuffer support

//Include virtual framebuffer support
WITH_FRAMEBUFFER_XVFB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable FreeType framework
WITH_FREETYPE:BOOL=OFF

//Include GDAL Support
WITH_GDAL:BOOL=OFF

//Include DICOM support
WITH_GDCM:BOOL=OFF

//Include gPhoto2 library support
WITH_GPHOTO2:BOOL=OFF

//Include Gstreamer support

//Include GTK support

//Use GTK version 2

//Include Halide support

//Include Ste||ar Group HPX support
WITH_HPX:BOOL=OFF

//Include GIF support
WITH_IMGCODEC_GIF:BOOL=OFF

//Include HDR support
WITH_IMGCODEC_HDR:BOOL=ON

//Include PFM formats support
WITH_IMGCODEC_PFM:BOOL=ON

//Include SUNRASTER support
WITH_IMGCODEC_SUNRASTER:BOOL=ON

WITH_ITT:BOOL=ON

//Include JPEG2K support (Jasper)

WITH_JPEG:BOOL=ON

//Include JPEG XL support
WITH_JPEGXL:BOOL=OFF

//Use KleidiCV library for ARM platforms

//Include Lapack library support
WITH_LAPACK:BOOL=ON

.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/deriv.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/distransform.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/drawing.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/emd.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/emd_new.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/featureselect.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/filter.dispatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/floodfill.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/gabor.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/generalized_hough.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/geometry.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/grabcut.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/hershey_fonts.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/histogram.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/hough.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/imgwarp.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/intelligent_scissors.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/intersection.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/linefit.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/lsd.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/main.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/matchcontours.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/median_blur.dispatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/min_enclosing_triangle.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/moments.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/morph.dispatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/phasecorr.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/pyramids.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/resize.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/rotcalipers.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/samplers.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/segmentation.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/shapedescr.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/smooth.dispatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/spatialgradient.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/stackblur.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/subdivision2d.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/sumpixels.dispatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/tables.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/templmatch.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/thresh.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/utils.cpp;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/accumulate.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/bilateral.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/blend_linear.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/boxFilter.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/boxFilter3x3.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/calc_back_project.cl;/home/tspi/project/third_party/opencv-4.11.0/modules/imgproc/src/opencl/canny.cl;/home/tspi/project/third
